fields.name: Applying collision damage
fields.definition: for things that want to cause more or less collision damage

fields.name: Apply collision damage scale#0 means 1.  1 is standard scale.  Some things may want to apply more damage
Friendly apply collision damage scale#0 means 1.  1 is standard scale.  Some things may want to apply more damage, yet go soft on their friends
Game collision damage parameters
fields.definition: 0 - means take default value from globals.globals

fields.name: minimum velocity for game damage#if you are going below this velocity we stop all game damage
Applying absolute collision damage
fields.definition: for things that want to cause more or less collision damage

fields.name: Apply absolute collision damage scale#0 means 1.  1 is standard scale.  Some things may want to apply more damage
Friendly apply absolute collision damage scale#0 means 1.  1 is standard scale.  Some things may want to apply more damage, yet go soft on their friends
Absolute collision damage parameters
fields.definition: 0 - means take default value from globals.globals

fields.name: minimum velocity for absolute damage#if you are going below this velocity we stop all absolute damage
Alternative damage effect
fields.definition: Overrides the damage effect from globals.globals

options: Don't scale damage#typically, we scale the damage to make only "lethal" collision damage kill people; this flag overrides that behavior
Object may choose not to deal damage#in some cases (notably, the thruster pack) we should ask an object if it wants to opt out of dealing damage for one reason or another
